title: Vivot
description: Vivot is a civic participation prototype seeking support to become a reliable public-interest product for real-world use.
heroTitle: A digital participation prototype with real public value.
heroLede: Vivot already shows how petitions and polls can feel simpler and clearer. To turn this prototype into a secure product people can truly use, we are actively looking for support, partners, and institutional contacts, especially in government and municipalities.
microSupportText: If you work in government, a municipality, or a public institution, we would be glad to hear from you.
panelNoteTitle: If you work in government, research, or public funding:
panelNoteText: This project is looking for the right support to grow from prototype to usable public-interest infrastructure. We would be glad to talk.
missionCardTwoTitle: A simple app for petitions and polls.
missionCardTwoText: Later, ideally with stronger identity and e-ID support.
missionCardThreeText: Especially from government, municipalities, foundations, research, and other public institutions.
storyOneTitle: Still a prototype. But a serious one.
storyOneText: The foundation already works. To turn it into a dependable offering for real participation processes, we are looking for the right supporters and institutional contributors.
storyListOne: Support to turn the prototype into a clean, safe product.
storyListTwo: Partners for stronger identity checks, e-ID, and responsible real-world rollout.
storyListThree: Connections into government, politics, municipalities, or public funding programs.
contactText: You can try the current version in the web app. Even more important right now is contact with people who can help turn this prototype into a real, sustainable public-interest product.
